products.title: Hydro Jelly Mask 650g | Pure Himalayan | Soothing & Hydration
products.body_html:
Restore balance to your skin with the Pure Himalaya Jelly Mask, formulated to calm, hydrate, and repair. This mask helps balance the skin’s pH, provides deep hydration, and promotes skin tightening and brightening for a refreshed and youthful look.

Function:

Hydrates, tightens, repairs, balances the pH of the skin, and brightens the complexion. Helps soothe and restore the skin’s natural glow.

Ingredients:

Zea Mays Starch, Niacinamide, Sodium Alginate, Altodextrin, Kojic Acid, Arbutin, Collagen Extract, Hyaluronic Acid, Betaine, Rose Petal, Glutathione, Glycyrrhiza Uralensis (Licorice) Extract, Tocopherol, Retinol, Acetyl Hexapeptide-8, Fullerenes, Panax Ginseng Root Powder, Carthamus Tinctorius (Safflower) Flower Powder, Ascorbic Acid, Daucus Carota Sativa (Carrot) Seed Oil, Mineral Salts, Rosa Rugosa Flower Oil.

Caution:

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Do not dispose of mask or pieces down the drain. Store in a cool, dry place.

Direction:

After facial cleansing, mix the jelly mask and purified water until it is particle-free and apply evenly on the face and neck. After 15-20 minutes, peel off to remove.

Net Weight: 650g / 23 fl. oz.

products.title: Hydro Jelly Mask 650g | Lemon | Radiance & Freshness
products.body_html:
Calm and repair your skin with the Lemon Jelly Mask, formulated to whiten and control excess oil. This mask helps to reduce skin issues, leaving it fresh and balanced. It is perfect for both the face and body, providing a comprehensive skincare solution.

Efficacy:

Effectively calms and repairs skin problems while controlling oil and brightening the skin.

Ingredients:

Zea Mays Starch, Diatomite, Sodium Alginate, Maltodextrin, Hyaluronic Acid, Betaine, Lavender Extract, Lavender Petals.

Direction:

Mix the powder with 30ml of water. Adjust the water amount to get the desired consistency. Mix quickly and spread evenly over the skin for 10-15 minutes. Peel off to remove. Use 1-2 times per week. Can also be used on the face and body.

Caution:

Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Do not dispose of the mask in the drain. For external use only. Store in a cool, dry place.

Net Weight: 650g / 23 fl. oz.

3D Silicon Eyelash and Makeup Practice Board
products.body_html:
Perfect Makeup Assistant: This makeup practice board is the ideal tool for honing your skills. The more you practice, the better the results, preventing discomfort when applying makeup to your own face. It’s a fantastic mannequin for creating makeup styles, eyelash training, makeup application, face painting, and massage practice.

3D Makeup Practice Board: Made from textured biomimetic silicone, this board offers a realistic 3D skin texture, closely resembling human skin. Every makeup application looks as real as on your own face.

Reusable Makeup Tool: Perfect for eyelash extension training, makeup application, face painting, and massage practice. This practice board can be reused over 5,000 times, allowing you to practice and see immediate results without damaging your skin.

Eye Makeup Practice: This learning makeup kit includes a practice face and five makeup brushes. Mainly used for practicing eye and eyelid makeup, all makeup can be easily removed with makeup remover, making the tool reusable. Ideal for eyelashes, eyeliner, etc.

Best Gift Choice: With a neat gift package and portable size, this board is perfect to take anywhere. It’s an ideal gift for your mother, daughter, best friend, beauty students, masseuses, and all women practicing makeup or face massage, as well as beginner artists. They will love it.

products.title: UV Lamp Sun T2 Plus | Gold | 42 LED | 98W
products.body_html:
⚠️ Warning – Safety

Never look directly at the UV LED lamp while it is on. This lamp emits UV-A rays (long wavelength) which can damage the retina and eyes upon direct or repeated exposure. Keep out of reach of children. For prolonged use, wear UV-protective glasses.

products.title: Professional Makeup Artist Director's Chair with Headrest | Silver
products.body_html:
Professional Makeup Chair

This professional and mobile makeup chair is designed for makeup application or characterization. Equipped with a footrest, it combines elegance and functionality.

Features:

  • Robust Construction: Made of durable aluminum for maximum durability and stability.
  • Comfortable: The seat is wide and comfortable, ensuring a pleasant sitting experience for clients.
  • Resistant: The material is waterproof, dirt-resistant, and easy to clean with soapy water.
  • Stability: The chair does not wobble, providing a stable and reliable experience for users.
  • Lightweight and Portable: Though sturdy, the chair is very light and easy to transport.

Uses:

The makeup chair will greatly facilitate your work, allowing your clients to sit at a comfortable height. It can also serve as a director's chair, perfect for a film set. Ideal for use in theater, outdoor, or in your own creative space.

Dimensions and Capacity:

  • Weight: 4 kg
  • Capacity: 120 kg

products.title: Pierre Cardin | Micellar Water | 300 ml
products.body_html:
Pierre Cardin Micellar Cleansing Water

Pierre Cardin Micellar Cleansing Water is designed for all skin types, providing an easy and effective way to remove makeup in one step without rinsing. Enriched with Aloe Vera and Cucumber Extract, this micellar water gently cleanses and refreshes the face, eyes, and lips, leaving the skin feeling clean and hydrated.

Volume: 300ml

Directions: Apply to a cotton pad and gently wipe over the face, eyes, and lips. No need to rinse. Use daily, morning and evening.

Warnings: For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes. Store at room temperature. Keep out of reach of children.

products.title: Pierre Cardin Zoom Eye – Volume & Lengthening Mascara Black 500 - 7 ml
products.body_html:
Introducing our ultra-creamy mascara designed to give you the dramatic look of false eyelashes without the hassle. With a luxurious creamy texture, it coats each lash with the deepest, most intense black color for mesmerizing eyes. The volumizing brush effortlessly separates and defines each lash, ensuring a clean, clump-free finish every time. Say hello to lengthened, volumized lashes that elevate your look to new heights.

Safety Information:
Avoid applying or removing eye cosmetics in a moving vehicle. Don’t use eye cosmetics if you have an infection or inflammation around your eyes. Wait until healing is complete. Discard any products used during an infection. Stop using if irritation occurs, and consult a doctor if it persists.

Ingredients:

products.title: Pierre Cardin Roll Act Lashes – Curl & Volume Mascara Black 500 - 7 ml
products.body_html:
Introducing our spectacular RollAct mascara formula, designed to curl lashes and add remarkable volume. With just one application, your lashes are instantly loaded with volume while achieving maximum separation, suppleness, and comfort. Say goodbye to clumpy, stiff lashes and hello to a luxurious, fluttery look that lasts all day.

Safety Information:
Avoid applying or removing eye cosmetics in a moving vehicle. Don’t use eye cosmetics if you have an infection or inflammation around your eyes. Wait until healing is complete. Discard any products used during an infection. Stop using if irritation occurs, and consult a doctor if it persists.

Ingredients:

products.title: Pierre Cardin Lash Maestro Mascara Black 505 - 10 ml
products.body_html:
Transform your lashes instantly with Lash Maestro! This richly-pigmented, volumizing mascara delivers instant length and definition to each and every lash. Coat your lashes in pure, deep color for an irresistible look. Pump up the volume, length, and curl of your lashes for a lusher, plusher, and bolder appearance.

Safety Information:
Avoid applying or removing eye cosmetics in a moving vehicle. Don’t use eye cosmetics if you have an infection or inflammation around your eyes. Wait until healing is complete. Discard any products used during an infection. Stop using if irritation occurs, and consult a doctor if it persists.

Ingredients:

Aqua, Ci 77499, Synthetic Beeswax, Paraffin, Acacia Senegal Gum, Butylene Glycol, Glyceryl Stearate, Stearic Acid, Palmitic Acid, Vp/Eicosene Copolymer, Vp/Hexadecene Copolymer, Copernicia Cerifera Cera, Aminomethyl Propanol, Oryza Sativa Cera, Phenoxyethanol, Dimethicone, Octyldodecanol, Nylon-6, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Tropolone, Silica, Triethoxycaprylylsilane.

products.title: Pierre Cardin Illegal Look Lengthening & Curling Mascara - Black - 8 ML
products.body_html:
Experience the ultimate in lash transformation with our special thick formulation mascara, enriched with fibers for unparalleled length and curl. Achieve seductive, captivating looks in seconds with our uniquely designed asymmetric brush, ensuring easy application and flawless results. Say hello to lashes that are beautifully curled, lengthened, and irresistibly alluring

Safety Information:
Avoid applying or removing eye cosmetics in a moving vehicle. Don’t use eye cosmetics if you have an infection or inflammation around your eyes. Wait until healing is complete. Discard any products used during an infection. Stop using if irritation occurs, and consult a doctor if it persists.

Ingredients:

Aqua CI 77499 Synthetic Beeswax Paraffin Acacia Senegal Gum Butylene Glycol Glyceryl Stearate Stearic Acid Palmitic Acid VP Eicosene Copolymer VP Hexadecene Copolymer Copernicia Cerifera Cera Aminomethyl Propanol Oryza Sativa Cera Phenoxyethanol Dimethicone Octyldodecanol Nylon-6 Hydroxyethylcellulose Tropolone Silica Triethoxycaprylylsilane

products.title: Pierre Cardin | Sun Cream SPF 50+ | 75 ml
products.body_html:
Pierre Cardin Sun Cream SPF 50+

Pierre Cardin Sun Cream SPF 50+ provides very high protection against UVA and UVB rays. Enriched with Vitamin E, this sun cream is suitable for both face and body. It helps to prevent sunburn and protects the skin from harmful UV radiation while keeping it hydrated and smooth.

Volume: 75ml

Directions:

  1. Apply generously to all exposed skin areas 15-20 minutes before sun exposure.
  2. Reapply every 2 hours, and after swimming, sweating, or towel drying.

Warnings: For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Avoid prolonged sun exposure, even while using a sunscreen product.

Warnings: Do not expose the product to direct sunlight and protect it from excessive heat. Do not use the product if it has changed appearance or smell. Close the cap tightly after using the product. The effectiveness of sunscreen products depends on the amount and correct application; therefore, use your product as indicated on the label. For external use only. Avoid contact with the eyes. Store at room temperature. Keep out of reach of children.

Ingredients: Aqua, Homosalate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Octocrylene, Hydrogenated Polydecene, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Caprylic/Capric Triglycerides, Ceteareth-20, Phenoxyethanol, Perfume, Tocopheryl Acetate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Butylphenyl Methylpropional, Hydroxycitronellal.
